name: Kindergarten Skateboarding & Cycling — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for safe riding decisions, equipment checks, and supervised skill practice. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with safe riding decisions, equipment checks, and supervised skill practice.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about safe riding decisions, equipment checks, and supervised skill practice through a close look at safe riding decisions, equipment checks, and supervised skill practice.

units.title: Wonder and notice: safe riding decisions, equipment checks, and supervised skill practice
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about safe riding decisions, equipment checks, and supervised skill practice?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about safe riding decisions, equipment checks, and supervised skill practice.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

activities.title: A close look at safe riding decisions, equipment checks, and supervised skill practice
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at safe riding decisions, equipment checks, and supervised skill practice, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in safe riding decisions, equipment checks, and supervised skill practice.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
